templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Start with your name, title, and a compelling summary of your skills and career goals.
templateFieldDefinition.name: name
templateFieldDefinition.label: Full Name

templateFieldDefinition.name: title
templateFieldDefinition.label: Professional Title
templateFieldDefinition.placeholder: e.g., Senior Software Engineer | Product Manager

templateFieldDefinition.name: summary
templateFieldDefinition.label: Professional Summary
templateFieldDefinition.placeholder: A 2-4 sentence summary of your experience, skills, and what you bring to the table. Tailor this to the job you're applying for.
templateFieldDefinition.livePreviewPlaceholder: [Write a 2-4 sentence summary of your experience, skills, and career goals. Tailor this to the job you are applying for to highlight your most relevant qualifications.]

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Provide ways for recruiters to get in touch with you.
templateFieldDefinition.name: email
templateFieldDefinition.label: Email Address

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Detail your professional roles, starting with the most recent.
templateFieldDefinition.name: experience
templateFieldDefinition.label: Experience

subFields.name: description
subFields.label: Responsibilities & Achievements
subFields.placeholder: Enter each achievement on a new line. Each new line will automatically become a bullet point.
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder:
[Start with an action verb to describe a key responsibility or achievement.]
 [Quantify your accomplishments with numbers and metrics to show impact.]
 [Keep bullet points concise and relevant to the job you're applying for.]

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: List your academic background, from university to high school.
templateFieldDefinition.name: education
templateFieldDefinition.label: Education

subFields.name: qualification
subFields.label: Qualification / Program
subFields.placeholder: e.g., B.S. in Computer Science, Class XII (CBSE)

subFields.name: institution
subFields.label: Institution / School / Board
subFields.placeholder: e.g., University of Technology, Delhi Public School

subFields.name: honorsOrMinor
subFields.label: Honors or Key Subjects (Optional)
subFields.placeholder: e.g., Magna Cum Laude, Science Stream (PCM)

subFields.name: description
subFields.label: Additional Details (Optional)
subFields.placeholder: Add any other relevant details, like projects or achievements.

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: List your technical and professional skills. Group them by category.
templateFieldDefinition.name: skills
templateFieldDefinition.label: Skills

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Showcase personal or academic projects that demonstrate your skills.
templateFieldDefinition.name: projects
templateFieldDefinition.label: Projects

subFields.name: description
subFields.label: Project Description
subFields.placeholder: Enter each achievement on a new line. Each new line will automatically become a bullet point.
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder:
[Briefly describe the project and its purpose.]
 [Explain your role and the key contributions you made to the project.]

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: List your relevant professional certifications and licenses.
templateFieldDefinition.name: certifications
templateFieldDefinition.label: Certifications & Licenses

subFields.name: name
subFields.label: Name of Certification or License
subFields.placeholder: e.g., AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Showcase your written contributions, such as journal articles, book chapters, or conference papers.
templateFieldDefinition.name: publications
templateFieldDefinition.label: Publications

subFields.name: title
subFields.label: Title
subFields.placeholder: e.g., The Impact of Quantum Computing on Financial Modeling

subFields.name: authors
subFields.label: Authors
subFields.placeholder: e.g., Doe, J., Smith, A., & Jones, B.

subFields.name: summary
subFields.label: Summary (Optional)
subFields.placeholder: Provide a brief 1-2 sentence summary of the work or your specific contribution.
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder: [Provide a brief 1-2 sentence summary of the publication's findings or your specific contribution.]

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Showcase your involvement in community service and non-profit activities.
templateFieldDefinition.name: volunteering
templateFieldDefinition.label: Volunteer Experience

subFields.name: achievements
subFields.label: Responsibilities & Achievements (Optional)
subFields.placeholder: Enter each achievement on a new line. Each new line will become a bullet point.
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder:
[Describe a key achievement or responsibility.]
[Quantify your impact, e.g., 'Coordinated a fundraising event that raised over $5,000 for local shelters.']

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: List any relevant awards, honors, or scholarships you have received for your work or academic performance.
templateFieldDefinition.name: awards
templateFieldDefinition.label: Awards & Honors

subFields.name: awardName
subFields.label: Award or Honor Name
subFields.placeholder: e.g., Dean's List, Employee of the Quarter

subFields.name: issuer
subFields.label: Awarded by
subFields.placeholder: e.g., University of Technology, Innovate Corp.

subFields.name: description
subFields.label: Brief Description (Optional)
subFields.placeholder: e.g., Awarded for achieving top 5% academic standing in the department.
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder: [Briefly describe the significance of the award or what it was for.]

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: List the languages you speak and your proficiency level for each.
templateFieldDefinition.name: languages
templateFieldDefinition.label: Languages

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: List your affiliations with relevant professional organizations.
templateFieldDefinition.name: memberships
templateFieldDefinition.label: Professional Memberships

subFields.name: organization
subFields.label: Organization Name
subFields.placeholder: e.g., Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE)

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: List the jurisdictions where you are licensed to practice law.
templateFieldDefinition.name: barAdmissions
templateFieldDefinition.label: Bar Admissions

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: List your professional licenses required for practice in your field, such as RN, PE, or CPA.
templateFieldDefinition.name: licensure
templateFieldDefinition.label: Licensure

subFields.name: issuingBody
subFields.label: Issuing Body
subFields.placeholder: e.g., California Board of Registered Nursing
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder: [Issuing Body, e.g., State Board of Engineering]

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Detail your hands-on clinical training, rotations, and practicum experiences.
templateFieldDefinition.name: clinicalExperience
templateFieldDefinition.label: Clinical Experience

subFields.name: description
subFields.label: Key Skills & Responsibilities (Optional)
subFields.placeholder: On separate lines, list key skills, procedures, and patient populations. e.g., Administered medications and performed wound care for post-operative patients.
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder:
[Describe a key skill, e.g., 'Assessed and monitored vital signs for a diverse patient caseload.']
[Collaborated with nursing staff to implement patient care plans.]

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Detail the research grants and funding you have secured as an individual or part of a team.
templateFieldDefinition.name: grants
templateFieldDefinition.label: Grants & Funding

subFields.name: grantTitle
subFields.label: Grant or Project Title
subFields.placeholder: e.g., A Study of Machine Learning Models in Climate Prediction
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder: [Name of the Grant or Research Project]

subFields.name: description
subFields.label: Brief Description (Optional)
subFields.placeholder: Provide a 1-2 sentence summary of the research funded by the grant.
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder: [Provide a brief 1-2 sentence description of the funded research.]

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Detail your experience in teaching, lecturing, or assisting in academic or professional courses.
templateFieldDefinition.name: teachingExperience
templateFieldDefinition.label: Teaching Experience

subFields.name: achievements
subFields.label: Responsibilities & Achievements (Optional)
subFields.placeholder: On separate lines, list key responsibilities and accomplishments. e.g., Led weekly lab sessions for over 100 students.
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder:
[Describe a key responsibility, e.g., 'Led weekly discussion sections for 50+ students.']
[Mention an accomplishment, e.g., 'Received a 95% positive feedback rating from student evaluations.']

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Detail your active security clearance information.
templateFieldDefinition.name: securityClearance
templateFieldDefinition.label: Security Clearance

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Add a custom section to highlight anything else, like patents, interests, or other achievements.
templateFieldDefinition.name: custom
templateFieldDefinition.label: Custom Sections

subFields.name: content
subFields.label: Content
subFields.placeholder: Enter each item on a new line. Each new line will become a bullet point.

templateFieldDefinition.sectionDescription: Highlight your participation in notable workshops, hackathons, and competitions.
templateFieldDefinition.name: events
templateFieldDefinition.label: Workshops & Hackathons

subFields.name: achievement
subFields.label: Achievement (Optional)
subFields.placeholder: e.g., Winner - 1st Place, Best Use of API

subFields.name: description
subFields.label: Description (Optional)
subFields.placeholder: On separate lines, describe the project you built or what you learned.
subFields.livePreviewPlaceholder:
[Describe the project you built or what you learned.]
[Mention the technologies used, e.g., 'Developed a web app using React and Firebase to...']
